## 3. Deep Research panel

### Lifetime DR review verdicts (82 reviewed of 471 = 17.4% coverage)

| Verdict | Count | Rate (of reviewed) |
|---|---:|---:|
| ADJUSTED | 45 | 54.9% |
| OVERRIDDEN | 31 | 37.8% |
| ERROR_PARSING | 3 | 3.7% |
| UPGRADED | 1 | 1.2% |
| INCOMPLETE_TRADING_LEVELS | 1 | 1.2% |
| CONFIRMED | 1 | 1.2% |
| *(no DR run)* | 389 | — |

DR is the **dominant editor on actionable trades**: it modifies ~55% and outright reverses ~38% of every PM BUY/BUY_LIMIT it reviews. That is high enough to matter — a single PM-only day would meaningfully change which positions hit the book.

### DR action mix after review

| Action | Count |
|---|---:|
| BUY_LIMIT | 35 |
| AVOID | 34 |
| BUY | 12 |
| WATCH | 1 |

Roughly 41% of post-DR outcomes are AVOID, meaning DR is the gate that stops a third of PM-approved candidates from being entered.

### Today's individual DR cases

| Ticker | PM | DR verdict | DR action | DR score | DR conviction | DR reasoning (excerpt) |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---|---|
| **NU** | BUY | ADJUSTED | BUY | 35 | MODERATE | "Fundamental business remains a powerhouse, but macro-driven credit cycle fears dominate the narrative; tactical mean-reversion play on oversold RSI, strict risk management required." |
| **NGG** | BUY | OVERRIDDEN | AVOID | 25 | HIGH | "The -7.96% drop represents the beginning of a structural derating from an unsustainable 57% premium to RAB, exacerbated by massive CapEx requirements and high debt — mean-reversion bounce too risky." |

DR delta: NU's entry levels were left identical (11.75–12.05 entry, 11.35 SL, 12.80/13.50 TPs). NGG was wholesale rejected — high conviction, low score.

## 6. Broken-service / data-health flags

| # | Issue | Severity | Evidence |
|---:|---|---|---|
| 1 | `decision_tracking` is **empty** (0 rows) | **HIGH** | The tracking job has produced zero post-decision price snapshots, lifetime. Outcome measurement and the planned feedback loop are non-functional. |
| 2 | **WTW active position trading below its stop** | **HIGH** | current_price 247.72 < stop_loss 253.50 (−2.33%); either monitor isn't closing positions through SL or `current_price` is stale (last_reviewed 2026-05-14). |
| 3 | `decision_points.status='Owned'` rows with **no** `desk_positions` record: **63 of 107 (59%)** | **HIGH** | Long-standing ETL gap — most "Owned" decisions never produced a desk row. Includes today's NU. Risks: P&L, win-rate, and re-assessment metrics all undercount. |
| 4 | **`subscribers` table is empty** | **HIGH** | Daily email summary has no recipients. Background email task is running against an empty list. |
| 5 | **NULL `ai_score`**: 462 / 471 lifetime (98.1%); **132 / 132** in last 7 days | **HIGH** | The score column the gatekeeper/PM is supposed to populate is not being written. Downstream analytics that filter on score are silently broken. |
| 6 | **`sector` is NULL** for all 15 of today's rows; lifetime ~all rows | **MEDIUM** | Sector enrichment service isn't tagging new decisions. Clusters / sector concentration analytics impossible. |
| 7 | **Stuck PENDING decision_points**: 28 total; **17 are >14 days old**, oldest from 2026-04-09 | **MEDIUM** | Decisions that the agent loop never resolved. Some are test rows (TEST, T8_*, TEST_T12) but ~22 are real tickers (SHOP, COKE, FN, IMO, FORM, SSNC, FIG, CAR, ASND, IBRX, BKRKY, NXT, ASTS, CNA, G, QXO/PB, SNGNF, DOCN, TPL, PBMRF, APA, IBRX). |
| 8 | **DR funnel gaps last 14 days**: 24 BUY/BUY_LIMIT rows have no DR verdict | **MEDIUM** | Includes recent live names (APP, APPF, FLUT, VIV, ELAN, NTRA, GMAB, CRWV, SHOP, ETN, PCOR, CDW, CHDN, XPO, AEIS, RBLX, GTES, CLH) plus test rows. ~25% of recent actionable PM verdicts skipped DR. |
| 9 | `ERROR_PARSING` DR responses: 3 lifetime (HQY 04-10, PPERF 04-11, ADBE 04-23) | **LOW** | Parser failures look bursty in early April; none since 04-23. Worth a regression-test sample. |
| 10 | Test rows (TEST, TEST_T3, TEST_T12, T8_BUY, T8_BUY_LIMIT, T8_WATCH, T8_AVOID) marked status='Owned' / 'Pending' | **LOW** | 7 fake-ticker rows polluting the Owned/Pending buckets and recommendation totals. |
| 11 | Duplicate decision_points for same ticker same day (HUBS 04-14 ×2 BUY, NICE 04-14 + 05-06 BUY, FN 05-05 ×2, FIG 04-23 ×2, CAR 04-25 ×2, SHOP 05-05/05-11) | **LOW** | Possible duplicate-screen or re-screen behavior; some are legit re-entries days apart, some are minutes apart. Worth de-dupe rules. |

---

## 7. Insights & takeaways

- **Today's pipeline behaved well on a quiet day.** 15 candidates, mostly small-cap volatility tourists, mostly correctly AVOIDed; the two BUY verdicts each got DR review (one kept, one killed).
- **DR is doing meaningful work.** Of 82 lifetime DR reviews, 38% are full reversals and 55% are adjustments — only 4 cases ever rubber-stamped (UPGRADED + CONFIRMED). Today's NGG OVERRIDE is a textbook case: PM saw a tradable dip, DR saw structural derating, DR won. **Keep DR as a hard gate on every BUY/BUY_LIMIT.**
- **DR coverage is incomplete.** ~25% of recent PM BUY/BUY_LIMIT verdicts never received a DR verdict. Given DR reverses ~38% of what it sees, this is a meaningful blind spot — some of those 24 ungated names became real positions.
- **Trade engine still net-positive but stop-loss is the dominant drag.** Closed P&L is +44.27% summed across 40 trades. The 6 stop-outs alone are −31.5% summed; the 13 take-profits are +89.0%. The system makes money when it lets winners run and loses tail-distribution money on stops — typical, but worth checking whether SL widths are too tight on a few names (CE −9.1%, NICE −8.7%, SHOP −7.7% all hit hard).
- **WTW position is the most actionable urgent item.** Trading below stop. Either the stop should have triggered (operational failure) or the data is stale; both want immediate review tomorrow morning.
- **The data layer has multiple silent failures.** `decision_tracking` empty, `ai_score` not populated, `sector` not populated, 63/107 Owned rows lacking desk_positions, subscribers empty. Each one is a small bug but together they cripple the feedback loop the project is trying to build.
- **Today's 60% AVOID skew is small-sample noise** driven by the cluster of low-quality dips (quantum + miners + crypto-adjacent). Don't read trend from one day.
- **Test pollution is small but persistent.** 7 fake tickers sitting in Owned/Pending. Easy cleanup.

---

## 8. Suggested next actions

Prioritised by impact:

1. **Investigate WTW** — confirm whether SL fired, whether `current_price` updater ran, whether the position should be closed manually tomorrow open. *(HIGH)*
2. **Fix output-destination delivery** — the scheduled task can't write to the Desktop and Documents locations. Mount them through `request_cowork_directory` or move the targets under `/Users/simonbaumgart/Antigravity/Stock-Tracker/audit_reports/`. Likely affected the 05-12, 05-13, 05-14 audits too. *(HIGH)*
3. **Close the DR funnel gap** — backfill DR review on the 24 recent BUY/BUY_LIMIT rows missing a verdict; add a guard so no BUY/BUY_LIMIT exits the pipeline without DR adjudication. *(HIGH)*
4. **Repair the `decision_tracking` ingestor** — without it, the highest-priority backlog item (backtesting + feedback loop) cannot start. Verify the tracking_service task is actually scheduled and writing. *(HIGH)*
5. **Reconcile `decision_points.status='Owned'` ↔ `desk_positions`** — write a one-shot script that creates a desk_positions row for every Owned decision_point missing one (or marks the decision as not-actually-owned). *(MEDIUM)*
6. **Populate `ai_score` and `sector`** — these are referenced by the audit and presumably by downstream services. Find the writers and confirm they're invoked. *(MEDIUM)*
7. **Resolve or expire stuck PENDING** — 22 real-ticker PENDINGs >24h old. Either re-run them through the agents or move them to a terminal status with a "STALE" tag. *(MEDIUM)*
8. **Tighten stop-loss policy on early-week entries** — CE, NICE, SHOP, ALC all stopped out >6%. Worth a quick study on whether wider stops or tighter sizing would have improved tail outcomes. *(MEDIUM)*
9. **Prune test rows** — delete TEST*, T8_*, TEST_T* from decision_points (or quarantine via a `is_test` flag). *(LOW)*
10. **Add a daily QC summary** that fails the build if `ai_score IS NULL` on today's rows or `decision_tracking` had no inserts. Stops the data-health drift from going silent for weeks. *(LOW)*
